title: DEKTON Geckogrip White Cable Hooks 20pc- Self-Adhesive Cable Management Clips| Tidy & Organize Wires| Strong Adhesive for Secure Hold| Ideal for Home, Office, and Workspace| Compact & Discreet White
features: Effortless Cable Management: Keep your living or workspace clutter-free with Dekton Geckogrip Cable Hooks, designed to help you easily organize and tidy up cables, wires, and cords. These self-adhesive cable management clips prevent tangling and ensure a neat appearance, whether you're arranging power cords, USB cables, or network wires.

Strong Adhesive for Secure Hold: Equipped with a robust adhesive backing, these cable hooks offer a firm and long-lasting grip on various surfaces, including walls, desks, and furniture. The adhesive is engineered to withstand daily use and keep your cables securely in place, reducing the risk of tripping hazards or accidental disconnections.

Compact & Discreet Design: The compact and discreet white design of these cable hooks blends seamlessly into any decor, making them an unobtrusive yet effective solution for cable management. Their small size ensures they won't distract from your room's aesthetics while still offering powerful functionality.

Versatile Application: The Dekton Geckogrip Cable Hooks are highly versatile and can be used in various settings, including homes, offices, workshops, and more. They are suitable for a wide range of cables, such as electrical wires, charging cords, Ethernet cables, and more.

Value Pack for Comprehensive Coverage: This pack includes 20 cable hooks, providing ample coverage for all your cable management needs. Whether you're tackling a single area or multiple rooms, this value pack ensures you have enough hooks to organize cables throughout your home or office.
description: Organize and manage your cables effortlessly with the Dekton Geckogrip White Cable Hooks. This 20-piece set of self-adhesive cable management clips is the ultimate solution for keeping your home, office, or workspace clutter-free. Designed with practicality and convenience in mind, these hooks help you tidy up tangled wires and cables, ensuring a neat and organized environment. Each hook features a strong adhesive backing that provides a secure hold on various surfaces, including walls, desks, and even the back of appliances. This reliable adhesion ensures that your cables stay in place, reducing the risk of trips, falls, or accidental disconnections. The compact and discreet white design of these cable hooks blends seamlessly with any decor, making them a versatile choice for any room or setting. They are particularly useful for organizing cords around your workspace, preventing cable clutter from disrupting your productivity. The easy-to-use self-adhesive backing means no tools or screws are required—simply peel, stick, and press to secure the hook in place. Each hook is designed to accommodate a variety of cable sizes, from thin phone charger cords to thicker power cables, making them a versatile addition to your cable management toolkit. The durable material ensures long-lasting use, while the adhesive is engineered to hold strong without damaging surfaces, making them ideal for renters or those who frequently rearrange their spaces. These hooks can be easily removed and repositioned as needed, providing flexibility for any future reorganization.
